'''âv-p-n''' ('''kavapan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electroacupuncture|electroacupuncture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electroacupuncture|electroacupuncture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-p-n
|-
! Lemma
| kavapan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivapan|thivapan]] || [[word:jivapan|jivapan]] || [[word:shivapan|shivapan]] || [[word:kivapan|kivapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvapan|thuthuvapan]] || [[word:jujuvapan|jujuvapan]] || [[word:shushuvapan|shushuvapan]] || [[word:kukuvapan|kukuvapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvapan|thuvapan]] || [[word:juvapan|juvapan]] || [[word:shuvapan|shuvapan]] || [[word:kuvapan|kuvapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvapan|thuvapan]] || [[word:juvapan|juvapan]] || [[word:shuvapan|shuvapan]] || [[word:kuvapan|kuvapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevapan|thevapan]] || [[word:jevapan|jevapan]] || [[word:shevapan|shevapan]] || [[word:kevapan|kevapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovapan|thothovapan]] || [[word:jojovapan|jojovapan]] || [[word:shoshovapan|shoshovapan]] || [[word:kokovapan|kokovapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovapan|thovapan]] || [[word:jovapan|jovapan]] || [[word:shovapan|shovapan]] || [[word:kovapan|kovapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovapan|thovapan]] || [[word:jovapan|jovapan]] || [[word:shovapan|shovapan]] || [[word:kovapan|kovapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvapan|thĂŠvapan]] || [[word:jĂŠvapan|jĂŠvapan]] || [[word:shĂŠvapan|shĂŠvapan]] || [[word:kĂŠvapan|kĂŠvapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavapan|thathavapan]] || [[word:jajavapan|jajavapan]] || [[word:shashavapan|shashavapan]] || [[word:kakavapan|kakavapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavapan|thavapan]] || [[word:javapan|javapan]] || [[word:shavapan|shavapan]] || [[word:kavapan|kavapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavapan|thavapan]] || [[word:javapan|javapan]] || [[word:shavapan|shavapan]] || [[word:kavapan|kavapan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavapan|shavapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavapan|goshavapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavapan|gokishavapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavapanĂŒ|shavapanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavapanknĂŒ|goshavapanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapanĂŒ|gokishavapanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavapanshĂ«|shavapanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavapankshĂ«|goshavapankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavapanshĂ«|gokishavapanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapanro|shavapanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapankro|goshavapankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapanro|gokishavapanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapanmu|shavapanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapankmu|goshavapankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapanmu|gokishavapanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavapansher|shavapansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavapanksher|goshavapanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavapansher|gokishavapansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavapang|shavapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavapankng|goshavapankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavapang|gokishavapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavapanya|shavapanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavapankya|goshavapankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavapanya|gokishavapanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavapanyam|shavapanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavapankyam|goshavapankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavapanyam|gokishavapanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavapanĂŒshĂ«|shavapanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavapanknĂŒshĂ«|goshavapanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavapanĂŒshĂ«|gokishavapanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapanĂŒro|shavapanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapanknĂŒro|goshavapanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapanĂŒro|gokishavapanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapanĂŒmu|shavapanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapanknĂŒmu|goshavapanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapanĂŒmu|gokishavapanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavapanshĂ«nĂŒ|shavapanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavapankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavapankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavapanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapanshĂ«ro|shavapanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapankshĂ«ro|goshavapankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapanshĂ«ro|gokishavapanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapanshĂ«mu|shavapanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapankshĂ«mu|goshavapankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapanshĂ«mu|gokishavapanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavapanronĂŒ|shavapanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavapankronĂŒ|goshavapankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapanronĂŒ|gokishavapanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavapanroshĂ«|shavapanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavapankroshĂ«|goshavapankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavapanroshĂ«|gokishavapanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapanromu|shavapanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapankromu|goshavapankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapanromu|gokishavapanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavapanmunĂŒ|shavapanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavapankmunĂŒ|goshavapankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapanmunĂŒ|gokishavapanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavapanmushĂ«|shavapanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavapankmushĂ«|goshavapankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavapanmushĂ«|gokishavapanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapanmuro|shavapanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapankmuro|goshavapankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapanmuro|gokishavapanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
